languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

languages.text: "Мой дражайший коллега просит передать, что не разделяет моих сильных эмоций и смиренно просит прощения за этот всплеск. Он также клянется Богом-Машиной, что создан по всем канонам священной инженерии и не является кощунственным извращением Его замысла".

"My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."
languages.original_text: "Мой дражайший коллега просит передать, что не разделяет моих сильных эмоций и смиренно просит прощения за этот всплеск. Он также клянется Богом-Машиной, что создан по всем канонам священной инженерии и не является кощунственным извращением Его замысла".

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

"My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

"My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

languages.text: «Mi querido colega me pide que le transmita que no comparte mis fuertes emociones y se disculpa humildemente en mi nombre por este arrebato. También jura ante el Dios Máquina que se creó de acuerdo con todos los cánones de ingeniería sagrada y que no es una perversión sacrílega de Su diseño».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: «Mi querido colega me pide que le transmita que no comparte mis fuertes emociones y se disculpa humildemente en mi nombre por este arrebato. También jura ante el Dios Máquina que se creó de acuerdo con todos los cánones de ingeniería sagrada y que no es una perversión sacrílega de Su diseño».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚请我代为转达，他并不像我这样情绪激动，并为刚才的失态诚恳道歉。他还以万机之神之名发誓，他的制造过程完全遵循神圣工程的规范，绝对没有亵渎祂的设计。”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚请我代为转达，他并不像我这样情绪激动，并为刚才的失态诚恳道歉。他还以万机之神之名发誓，他的制造过程完全遵循神圣工程的规范，绝对没有亵渎祂的设计。”

languages.text: « Mon cher collègue me demande de vous faire savoir qu'il ne partage pas mes fortes émotions et vous présente ses plus humbles excuses pour cet emportement. Il jure également sur le Dieu-Machine qu'il a été créé dans le respect de tous les canons de l'ingénierie sacrée et qu'il n'est pas une perversion blasphématoire de Ses desseins. »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cher collègue me demande de vous faire savoir qu'il ne partage pas mes fortes émotions et vous présente ses plus humbles excuses pour cet emportement. Il jure également sur le Dieu-Machine qu'il a été créé dans le respect de tous les canons de l'ingénierie sacrée et qu'il n'est pas une perversion blasphématoire de Ses desseins. »

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege bittet mich, Euch zu übermitteln, dass er meine starken Emotionen nicht teilt und entschuldigt sich in aller Demut für seinen Gefühlsausbruch. Überdies schwört er vor dem Maschinengott, dass er im Einklang mit sämtlichen religiösen Vorschriften der heiligen Ingenieurskunst geschaffen wurde und keine sakrilegische Perversion Seines Plans ist."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege bittet mich, Euch zu übermitteln, dass er meine starken Emotionen nicht teilt und entschuldigt sich in aller Demut für seinen Gefühlsausbruch. Überdies schwört er vor dem Maschinengott, dass er im Einklang mit sämtlichen religiösen Vorschriften der heiligen Ingenieurskunst geschaffen wurde und keine sakrilegische Perversion Seines Plans ist."

languages.text: 「私の親愛なる同僚は、私の強い感情を共有していないこと、そしてこの暴挙を謙虚に謝罪することを伝えてほしい。彼はまた、自分が神聖な工学のすべての規範に従って創造されたこと、そして自分が神の設計を冒涜するものではないことを、機械神の前で誓う。」
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: 「私の親愛なる同僚は、私の強い感情を共有していないこと、そしてこの暴挙を謙虚に謝罪することを伝えてほしい。彼はまた、自分が神聖な工学のすべての規範に従って創造されたこと、そして自分が神の設計を冒涜するものではないことを、機械神の前で誓う。」

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, benim güçlü duygularımı paylaşmadığını iletmemi istiyor ve bu patlama için alçakgönüllülükle özür diliyor. Ayrıca kutsal mühendisliğin tüm kurallarına göre yaratıldığına ve O'nun tasarımının saygısızca bir kâfirliği olmadığına Makine Tanrı üzerine yemin ediyor."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague asks me to convey that he does not share my strong emotions and humbly apologises for this outburst. He also swears before the Machine God that he was created according to all the canons of sacred engineering and that he is not a sacrilegious perversion of His design."

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, benim güçlü duygularımı paylaşmadığını iletmemi istiyor ve bu patlama için alçakgönüllülükle özür diliyor. Ayrıca kutsal mühendisliğin tüm kurallarına göre yaratıldığına ve O'nun tasarımının saygısızca bir kâfirliği olmadığına Makine Tanrı üzerine yemin ediyor."
